news.title: Dow Jones Futures: Techs Fall After Dow Hits High, AI Shrugs Off Broadcom, Ciena; Jobs Report Looms
news.summary: Dow Jones futures edged lower overnight, while S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq futures fell modestly. The May jobs report is on tap before Friday's open. S&P Dow Jones Indices announced late Thursday that it won't fast track SpaceX and other upcoming megacap IPOs such as Anthropic and OpenAI into the benchmark index.

news.title: Gold slips, set for weekly loss on Mideast tensions, rate-hike fears

news.title: JGBs Edge Higher, Tracking Gains in U.S. Treasurys
news.summary: TREASURYS 0010 GMT — JGBs edge higher in the morning Tokyo session, tracking overnight price gains in U.S. Treasurys. JGBs and Treasurys tend to move in tandem. JGB prices may also be supported by a mild decline in crude oil prices that could ease inflationary pressures in Japan.

news.summary: South America has become the largest source of new oil exports in 2026, adding 155 million barrels of exports through May.

news.title: Crypto ETF Problems Loom, Analysts Warn
news.summary: A boom in cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds has given investors more ways to buy digital assets over the past 2½ years, after U.S. regulators approved spot crypto funds. But investor demand remains concentrated in low-cost bitcoin and Ethereum products from major issuers such as BlackRock and Fidelity Investments.
